AssertionError: expected 4 to be 3 // Object.is equality

- Expected
+ Received

- 3
+ 4

 ❯ tests/math.test.ts:7:23

      6|   it('adds numbers', () => {
      7|     expect(add(2, 2)).toBe(3)
       |                       ^

     10|   it('trims whitespace', () => {
     11|     expect(trim('  hi  ')).toBe('hi')
